bugReportSent: Lipoti la Bug limatumizidwa! Zikomo potithandiza kusintha.
bugReportError: Kulakwitsa kutumiza lipoti la Bug. Akuyeseranso.
userAccountOptions: Zosankha za akaunti ya ogwiritsa ntchito
thankYouForTip: Zikomo kwambiri chifukwa cha upangiri wanu!
enterValidEmail: Chonde ikani adilesi yoyenera ya imelo
passwordCannotBeEmpty: Mawu achinsinsi sangathe kukhala opanda kanthu
couldNotAccessMicrophone: Takanika kulowa maikolofoni.vage onani zovomerezeka za msakatuli wanu.
gdprContent:
Timalemekeza chinsinsi chanu ndipo tili odzipereka poteteza zambiri zanu.Izi ndi zomwe muyenera kudziwa:

• Sitigulitsa zambiri zanu kwa maphwando atatu
• Timangosunga zomwe mumawerenga komanso zosintha za wogwiritsa ntchito
• Zambiri zimangogwiritsidwa ntchito popereka ntchito yathu yophunzirira chilankhulo
• Mutha kuchotsa deta yanu yonse nthawi iliyonse ndikusintha ndikudina pa 'Chotsani akaunti'
• Timatsatira malamulo a GDPP ndi ufulu wanu wokhudzana ndi zomwe mwapanga

Popitilizabe kugwiritsa ntchito ntchito yathu, mukutilola kusonkhanitsa kwathu ndi machitidwe omwe tafotokozazi.
